map_description:
E. coli core metabolic network
Last Modified Tue Apr 07 2026 12:14:02 GMT+0200 (hora de verano de Europa central)

1577545.name: succinate dehydrogenase (irreversible)
1577545.gene_reaction_rule: (b0721 and b0722 and b0723 and b0724)

1577553.name: D-glucose transport via PEP:Pyr PTS (periplasm)
1577553.gene_reaction_rule: (STM2433 and STM1203 and STM2431 and STM2432) or (STM1830 and STM1831 and STM1832 and STM2431 and STM2432) or (STM2433 and STM1465 and STM2431 and STM2432)

1577554.name: Glucose transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)

1577560.name: Glucose transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
1577560.gene_reaction_rule: STM0320 or STM0999 or STM1473 or STM2267

1577561.name: D-glucose transport in via proton symport (periplasm)

1577569.name: Cytochrome oxidase bo3 (ubiquinol-8: 4 protons) (periplasm)
1577569.gene_reaction_rule: STM0440 and STM0441 and STM0442 and STM0443

1577572.name: Phosphoadenylyl-sulfate reductase (glutaredoxin)
1577572.gene_reaction_rule: (STM2946 and STM0872) or (STM2946 and STM1165) or (STM2946 and STM1433) or (STM2946 and STM3702)

1577580.name: Ribonucleoside-diphosphate reductase (GDP) (glutaredoxin)
1577580.gene_reaction_rule: (STM3702 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM1165 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM1433 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM0872 and (STM2807 and STM2808))

1577583.name: Iron (+2) transport in via permease (no H+)

1577585.name: Pyruvate reversible transport via proton symport (periplasm)

1577587.name: L-glutamate transport via proton symport, reversible (periplasm)

1577593.name: ATP synthase (four protons for one ATP) (periplasm)
1577593.gene_reaction_rule: ((STM3869 and STM3870 and STM3871) and (STM3864 and STM3865 and STM3866 and STM3867 and STM3868)) or ((STM3869 and STM3870 and STM3871) and (STM3864 and STM3865 and STM3866 and STM3867 and STM3868) and STM3872)

1577594.name: Dimethyl sulfoxide reductase (Menaquinol 8) (periplasm)
1577594.gene_reaction_rule: (STM1499 and STM1498 and STM1497 and STM1496) or (STM0964 and STM0965 and STM0966) or (STM4305_S and STM4306 and STM4307) or (STM2528 and STM2530 and STM2529)

1577595.name: Dimethyl sulfoxide reductase (Demethylmenaquinol 8) (periplasm)

1577606.name: Glutaredoxin reductase
1577606.gene_reaction_rule: STM3702 or STM0872 or STM1433 or STM1165

1577614.name: Ribonucleoside-diphosphate reductase (CDP) (glutaredoxin)
1577614.gene_reaction_rule: (STM1433 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM1165 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM0872 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM3702 and (STM2807 and STM2808))

1577615.name: Ribonucleoside-diphosphate reductase (UDP) (glutaredoxin)
1577615.gene_reaction_rule: (STM1165 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM3702 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM1433 and (STM2807 and STM2808)) or (STM0872 and (STM2807 and STM2808))

1577652.gene_reaction_rule: (STM0585 or STM2199 or STM2777) and (STM1737 and STM3158 and STM3159)

1577653.name: Salmochelin S4 Fe III binding spontaneous
